title: 9.4" Backgammon Sets for Adults, Classic Board Game with Folding Faux Leather Backgammon Case, Portable Travel Backgammon Game Set (Black)
features: Classic Board Game: Backgammon is one of the oldest and most popular board games. The instruction manual provides game guides.
Complete Game Accessories: The backgammon set includes a faux leather case, 30 faux horn playing chips, 2 dice cups, and 5 dice to meet your gaming needs.

Strategic Mind Game: The table backgammon game that can greatly stimulate your interest，enhances your thinking and reaction skills. Suitable for travel, home use, game night family fun or party games.

Portable and Easy to Store: This travel backgammon set measures 9.4 x 7.1 inches (24 x 18 cm) when closed and 9.4 x 14.5 inches (24 x 37 cm) when opened. The backgammon set is equipped with a metal zipper and a portable handle for easy storage and to prevent the pieces and dice from getting lost. It also features a beautifully printed brand logo that highlights the brand's style.

Ideal Gift Choice: This backgammon game set in luxurious packaging and is suitable for various occasions and makes a great gift. Whether for holidays or casual entertainment, it brings endless fun and wonderful moments to your family and friends.
description: Product Description Backgammon Set Backgammon is a classic board game.
